design_identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and modal titles. DO NOT use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, labels, and form text.

mono.usage: Use for OTP inputs, code snippets, API keys, and sensitive data displays.

rules: Use #09090B as the global background. NEVER use #000000.
Use #6366f1 (Electric Indigo) sparsely. Only for the primary CTA and active states.
Text should be #FAFAFA (off-white) or #A1A1AA (muted grey) for hierarchy.
Borders must be subtle (#27272A). High contrast borders look cheap.

gradients.subtle_mesh: Use a dark noise texture overlay with opacity-5 to kill flat colors.

auth_pages.left_panel: Width 30% (Hidden on mobile). Abstract dark texture background + Quote or Logo.
auth_pages.right_panel: Width 70%. Centered content. Max-width 480px form container.
auth_pages.glass_card: On mobile/tablet, wrap form in a glass card centered on screen.

dashboard.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A). Mix of 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 widgets.

buttons.style: h-10 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95

inputs.style: h-11 rounded-lg bg-zinc-900/50 border-zinc-800 text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:border-primary transition-all
inputs.otp_group: Gap-2 or Gap-3. Individual slots must be square (w-10 h-10 or w-12 h-12).

cards.style: rounded-xl border border-zinc-800 bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground transition-colors

guidelines: No 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties (opacity, transform, color).
Page Transitions: Simple opacity fade + y-axis slide (y: 10 -> y: 0). Duration: 0.3s.

auth_background.usage: Use as the background for the left panel in the auth split layout. Apply 'object-cover' and 'opacity-80'.

user_avatar.usage: Use in the dashboard header/sidebar user profile section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Dark Mode' theme. No light mode toggle needed (problem statement says 'Debe ser dark mode').
Implement the 'Sidebar' with a collapse state. Use local storage to persist the state.
For the 'Code Verification' page, use a proper OTP input component (shadcn/ui InputOTP).
Ensure 'Resend' timer logic is visible and accessible.
Session persistence: Ensure the 'Remember Me' or session logic supports the 5-day requirement (mostly backend, but frontend needs to handle the token/cookie persistence logic if applicable).
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'login-submit-btn', 'email-input').
Do NOT use gradients for text. Keep text solid for maximum readability.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Be bold with spacing (p-8, p-12).
Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards.
